0908214a.text: 那個線程對我來說太高了！\255\001我想我需要更多的經驗。
0908214a.english_text: That thread is too high for me!\255\001Guess I need more experience.

125f01c5.english_text: Maybe I ought to stand a bit closer.

57dfea83.text: 我想我應該指出\255\001首先在某件事上。
57dfea83.english_text: I suppose I ought to point\255\001at something first.

a52daa15.text: 這裡任何織法都沒用…\255\001實在太吵了！
a52daa15.english_text: Can't spin any drafts in here.\255\001Too much noise!

95829936.english_text: Hmm. I guess that isn't a draft.

3cf7bb93.text: 我認為我的說法不太正確。
3cf7bb93.english_text: I don't think I spun that quite right.

a8f123f9.text: 那沒有做任何有用的事情。

e25cdc81.text: 這些線索感覺不太對勁。
e25cdc81.english_text: Those threads didn't feel quite right.

4469a8e9.text: 不過，我認為我走在是喔。道路上。
4469a8e9.english_text: Think I'm on the right track, though.

7fe449cf.text: 無法在演示模式下儲存遊戲。抱歉
7fe449cf.english_text: Can't save your game in demo mode. Sorry.

879f0c67.text: 歡迎來到偉大公會時代。
879f0c67.english_text: Welcome to the Age of the Great Guilds.

4b8365fa.text: 這個織法在葉子上不起作用。
4b8365fa.english_text: That draft won't work on a leaf.

f38bae03.english_text: I'd have to open it first.

7e096beb.english_text: Got enough light out of it already!

f87b5622.text: 沒用…嗯…好吧\255\001無論如何，黎明都會到來。
f87b5622.english_text: Didn't work. Oh, well.\255\001Dawn's coming anyway.

23b6601f.text: 這個織法在天空上不起作用。
23b6601f.english_text: That draft won't work on the sky.

c5635dd8.text: 你十七歲生日的曙光已經來臨。
c5635dd8.english_text: It is the dawn of your\255\001seventeenth year.

8dcc2066.english_text: I am sent by the Elders\255\001to summon you.

e039b979.text: 長老會正在聖域等候您。
e039b979.english_text: The High Council awaits your\255\001presence in the Sanctuary.

18a971ff.english_text: Never seen one so bright before.

4d0478b0.text: 它一定是某位長老編織的。
4d0478b0.english_text: One of the Elders must've woven it.

76927892.english_text: Better get down to the village.

1c724d2a.english_text: The view from the cliff is better.

7ccab299.english_text: Think I'll have to get closer first.

59b34c99.english_text: That draft won't work on an owl.

ce4e6266.text: 這要是叫『敞開』，那荊棘就沒刺了。
ce4e6266.english_text: They're about as open as thorns can get.

01817c75.text: 完全封死了，就跟刺藤一樣密不透風。
01817c75.english_text: They're about as closed as thorns can get.

e5544f5d.text: 這織法對荊棘不起作用。
e5544f5d.english_text: That draft won't work on thorns.

9d5eef50.english_text: The owl's tail feathers are\255\001blocking my view.

25770d7a.english_text: That draft won't work on a grave.

34d2ef49.english_text: Think I'll have to get closer first.

85c5dc09.english_text: +The day the sky is opened./ Hmm.

d17befa3.english_text: This hole has an owl too.

dec5e35c.text: 又一隻鴞！樹林裡一定到處都是它們。
dec5e35c.english_text: Another owl! The woods must be full of 'em.

69533184.text: 現在看起來好像所有的洞都填滿了。
69533184.english_text: Looks as if all the holes are full now.

9c1b5c74.text: 這織法對這個洞不起作用。
9c1b5c74.english_text: That draft doesn't work on the hole.

736feab4.text: 洞裡住著的生物可能不會喜歡這樣。
736feab4.english_text: Whatever lives in the hole\255\001might not like that.

11e37314.text: 也許…我最好別嘗試這樣做。
11e37314.english_text: Maybe I'd better not try that.

d6736344.english_text: This wool hasn't been dyed yet.

30f70243.english_text: White again. That's more like it.

f9317877.text: 綠色的…我最不喜歡的顏色。

154b629e.english_text: I like it better in white.

e659a94f.english_text: That draft won't work on a flask.

cd0df74d.english_text: The pot doesn't have a cover.

a99281dd.english_text: That draft won't work on a pot.

1162b162.text: 這是赫切爾有時會讓我翻閱的《織圖之書》。
1162b162.english_text: This is the Book of Patterns that\255\001Hetchel lets me read sometimes.

ec971f7a.text: 我已經知道裡面有什麼了。
ec971f7a.english_text: I already know what's in it.

2e980fd9.text: 該織法不適用於一本書。
2e980fd9.english_text: That draft won't work on a book.

e0bfdb1c.text: 它看起來已經蒼白到極致了。
e0bfdb1c.english_text: It already looks about as pale\255\001as it can get.

8b0aaaf7.english_text: That draft won't work on wool.

91ef580b.text: 這些線索描述了\255\001世界的創造\255\001以及兩個陰影的出現。
91ef580b.english_text: The threads describe the creation of the world\255\001and the passage of the Two Shadows.

7beeffff.text: 這幅掛毯描述了\255\001世界的創造\255\001以及兩個陰影的經過。
7beeffff.english_text: This tapestry describes the world's creation\255\001and the passage of the Two Shadows.

81838577.text: 此圖案顯示了公會的崛起，\255\001以及織者創立的故事。
81838577.english_text: The pattern shows the rise of the Guilds,\255\001and the story of the Weavers' founding.

1f24cbfd.text: 這幅掛毯展示了公會的崛起，\255\001以及織者創立的故事。
1f24cbfd.english_text: This tapestry shows the rise of the Guilds,\255\001and the story of the Weavers' founding.

6c9ac656.text: 這是長掛毯的最後一節。
6c9ac656.english_text: This is the last section of\255\001the Long Tapestry.

5cd6b153.text: 它說明了工會的衰落，\255\001以及第三個陰影的聚集。
5cd6b153.english_text: It illustrates the decline of the Guilds,\255\001and the gathering of a Third Shadow.

7e521a11.text: 奇怪的。這幅掛毯的結尾\255\001被完全撕掉了。
7e521a11.english_text: Odd. The end of this tapestry\255\001is torn completely off.

98e4462e.english_text: This is a section of the Long Tapestry.

8ac784c1.english_text: Here's another section of\255\001the Long Tapestry.

5f0cf23f.text: 這幅掛毯的色彩已經非常豐富了。
5f0cf23f.english_text: This tapestry's already as colorful\255\001as it can get.

9a7a33ca.text: 我已經把所有的綠色都揮霍光了。
9a7a33ca.english_text: I've already spun all the green out.

bede70a6.text: 我現在恐怕很難從中再提出什麼顏色了。
bede70a6.english_text: Doubt if I could spin much color\255\001out of it now.

2447d149.english_text: That draft won't work on a tapestry.

7df97efd.english_text: Looks as if the Elders are busy.

1645c2b3.text: 海切爾夫人，\255\001妳已知道委員會的調查結果了吧！
1645c2b3.english_text: You have heard the findings of the\255\001High Council, Dame Hetchel.

d84b14ed.text: 對於這些指控，妳有何話要為自己辯護？
d84b14ed.english_text: What have you to say in your defense?

41e2547f.text: 我沒有任何辯護或藉口，\255\001阿特羅波斯長老。
41e2547f.english_text: I have no defense or excuses,\255\001Elder Atropos.

88426dd8.text: 沒有藉口？沒有絲毫的悔恨嗎？
88426dd8.english_text: No defense? Not the slightest remorse?

0d581f00.text: 這種魯莽的反抗是無法容忍的。

cad23e1f.text: 海切爾，你為何違抗我們的命令？
cad23e1f.english_text: Why do you disobey us, Hetchel?

a41c4bff.text: 你一直嚴格遵守織者的規則。
a41c4bff.english_text: You have always upheld the\255\001Rules of Membership to the letter.

2c2ca79f.text: 告訴我們妳內心的想法。
2c2ca79f.english_text: Tell us what is in your heart.

38136c82.text: 克洛托斯長老，\255\001必須告訴這孩子\255\001關於他身世的真相。
38136c82.english_text: The boy must be told\255\001the truth about his\255\001birth, Elder Clothos.

5b454fdf.text: 不久之後，\255\001無論我們是否選擇引導他，\255\001他都將掌握織網之力。
5b454fdf.english_text: Soon he will wield\255\001the power of Weaving,\255\001whether we choose\255\001to guide him or not.

63adcef7.text: 我們現在不該放逐波賓。
63adcef7.english_text: We dare not desert Bobbin now.

c43ebe50.text: 你向西格娜的兒子透露的秘密\255\001可能會被用來對付我們。
c43ebe50.english_text: The secrets you reveal to Cygna's son\255\001may be turned against us.

3ff66d05.text: 這就是為什麼公會\255\001會禁止訓練他！
3ff66d05.english_text: That is why his training was\255\001forbidden by this Council!

584f43c2.text: 我們無需解釋我們的決定。
584f43c2.english_text: We need not explain our decisions.

7804ce35.text: 看到你多年來的忠誠服務\255\001以這種恥辱的方式結束\255\001我感到非常悲痛。
7804ce35.english_text: It grieves me to see\255\001your many years of\255\001faithful service\255\001end in this disgrace.

c835acc6.text: 但長老們的智慧不容置疑\255\001這是高於一切的最終規則！
c835acc6.english_text: But the wisdom of\255\001the Elders may not\255\001be questioned.\255\001\255\001That is the\255\001final Rule of\255\001Membership.

f7cc15fa.text: 妳的另一位學生－西格娜女士\255\001十七年前就在這間房間裡\255\001領悟到了違抗的可怕代價\255\001妳最好能記得那個教訓。
f7cc15fa.english_text: Another one of your\255\001students, Lady Cygna,\255\001learned the terrible\255\001price of defiance in\255\001this very chamber\255\001seventeen years ago.\255\001\255\001Better that\255\001you had heeded\255\001that lesson.

32fccd84.text: 我的命運掌握在你們的編織中，長老們。
32fccd84.english_text: My destiny is in your hands, Elders.

d2327694.text: 海切爾，我們並沒有掌握什麼。

e4877ce5.text: 如果你想知道自己的命運\255\001就再凝視一次那巨大的織機吧
e4877ce5.english_text: Gaze once more upon the Great Loom\255\001if you would know your destiny.

58319c1d.text: 看哪！讓織機展現你的命運吧！
58319c1d.english_text: For behold! That destiny is upon you.

fd1cca99.text: 這個織法過去從未失靈過。
fd1cca99.english_text: That draft has never failed before.

85ac945f.text: 誰竟敢褻瀆\255\001織者的織機？
85ac945f.english_text: Who dares to desecrate the\255\001Loom of the Weavers?

3907f266.text: 這是那個惡魔之子的傑作。
3907f266.english_text: This is the work of the demon boy.

bad7d425.text: 阿特羅波斯，趁現在還來得及，殺了他！
bad7d425.english_text: Kill it while you still can, Atropos!

a1998575.text: 西格娜之子的名字\255\001將永生永世遭到詛咒\255\001織機之子……波賓·疏織！
a1998575.english_text: Cursed forever be the name of Cygna's son,\255\001the Loom-Child ... Bobbin Threadbare!

1d4c3bf1.text: 為什麼他們總是把我丟下？
1d4c3bf1.english_text: Why do they always leave me behind?

d013fefa.english_text: That draft won't work on an egg.

7f11a376.english_text: That draft won't work on the Loom.

56f1e982.text: 奇怪的。她的喙在動\255\001但是她發不出聲音！
56f1e982.english_text: Strange. Her beak is moving, but\255\001she can't make a sound!

0bc14add.text: 那沒有用\255\001她一定是被下了某種魔法咒語
0bc14add.english_text: That didn't help. She must be under\255\001some kind of magic spell.

123b8292.text: 很安靜。織機中的迴聲\255\001都已經消失了。
123b8292.english_text: It's quiet. The echoes in the Loom\255\001have all died away.

a22fa954.text: 「那就是天鵝對長老們施展的同一個四音符織法。」
a22fa954.english_text: Those are the same four threads\255\001the swan spun on the Elders.

c4b24ea7.text: 那跟我剛才聽到的那四個音符一模一樣。
c4b24ea7.english_text: Those are the same four threads\255\001I heard a few moments ago.

2924d2c9.english_text: They're still echoing in the Loom!

57630be8.english_text: That egg just made a sound.

190eb4f5.english_text: Do not approach too closely, Weaver.

2937aba1.english_text: Throw away that stick, young fool.

bc794fa2.text: 你的編織魔法，對我不管用。
bc794fa2.english_text: Your Weaver magic cannot trouble me.

2d8a9c8e.text: 唔。這對她沒有任何好處。
2d8a9c8e.english_text: Hmm. That didn't do her any good.

f1f6cdd4.text: 謝天謝地！我又可以說話了！
f1f6cdd4.english_text: Thank goodness! I can talk again!

c8397f60.text: 鴨子是拿來吃的，不是聽的。
c8397f60.english_text: Ducks are meant to be eaten. Not heard.

754779c8.text: 我相信…我們正在討論織機的秘密。
754779c8.english_text: I believe we were discussing\255\001the secrets of the Loom.

38f27b77.text: 離開這個房間，邪惡之人。\255\001織機永遠不會屬於你！
38f27b77.english_text: Begone from this chamber, Evil One.\255\001The Loom shall never be yours!

151a0638.text: 這個男孩擁有毀滅它的力量！
151a0638.english_text: This boy holds the power to destroy it!

0b52bd15.text: 噓！現在閉上眼睛，小波賓。\255\001但請保持警覺！
0b52bd15.english_text: Ssh! Close your eyes now, little Bobbin.\255\001But keep your ears open!

f15b6a2f.text: 好吧，分散注意這招沒用。

2ef33910.text: 我無法再分散這傢伙的注意力了！
2ef33910.english_text: I can't distract this creature\255\001much longer!

24e71c73.text: 我需要這些音符線，海切爾媽媽！\255\001告訴我要使用哪四個！
24e71c73.english_text: I need the threads, Mother Hetchel!\255\001Tell me which four to use!

c6b1737a.english_text: This bird has annoyed me once too often.

4a77208c.english_text: Mother Hetchel! Where are you going?

d05ad918.text: 你很清楚是我。\255\001我看到你在看著我們。
d05ad918.english_text: You know perfectly well it's me.\255\001I saw you watching us.

09063f3c.text: 這裡發生了什麼事，海切爾？\255\001所有人都飛走了！
09063f3c.english_text: What's been happening here, Hetchel?\255\001The whole village has flown away!

63a763d6.english_text: I'd hoped the swan might come\255\001to save you.

11f04606.text: 但我萬萬沒想到牠會惹出這麼多麻煩！
11f04606.english_text: But I never expected her to weave\255\001as much mischief as this!

6cdd366a.text: 長老們原本打算把你變成天鵝\255\001就像他們對我做的那樣。
6cdd366a.english_text: From the Elders.\255\001\255\001They were going to turn\255\001you into a swan, as they\255\001tried to do to me.

715ce68a.text: 但…變出一顆蛋…\255\001已經是那些老骨頭的極限了。
715ce68a.english_text: Looks as if a cygnet was\255\001the best they could manage\255\001with these old bones.

21f8a79e.text: 為什麼長老們要除掉我？\255\001我沒有做錯什麼。
21f8a79e.english_text: Why do the Elders want to get rid of me?\255\001I haven't broken any Rules.

8da63c0a.text: 但為什麼有人要害怕我呢？
8da63c0a.english_text: But why should anyone be afraid of me?

fa69910c.text: 自從你來到我們的世界\255\001長老們就一直看著混沌\255\001在織機的圖案中蔓延。
fa69910c.english_text: Ever since you came into our world,\255\001the Elders have watched chaos spread\255\001across the Pattern in the Loom.

ebbcf5be.text: 他們相信…也『期望』…\255\001你的誕生是造成這場混沌的原因\255\001如果你被放逐，秩序可能會恢復。
ebbcf5be.english_text: They believed - hoped - that your birth\255\001was the cause of this chaos, and that\255\001order might return if you were banished.

1b8ccbff.text: 但現在長老們反而被放逐了\255\001而你還在這裡！\255\001這只能意味著一件事。
1b8ccbff.english_text: But now the Elders are banished,\255\001and you are still here!\255\001This can mean only one thing.

c0753b05.text: 織圖正在自行瓦解！\255\001\255\001它很快就會終結\255\001隨之終結的\255\001還有所有被它關聯的一切。
c0753b05.english_text: The Pattern is failing\255\001of its own accord.\255\001\255\001Soon it will come to\255\001an end ... and with it,\255\001all that is hemmed into\255\001its threads.

9dd297cf.text: 有什麼辦法可以阻止它嗎？
9dd297cf.english_text: Is there any way to stop it?

81a0c977.text: 阻止混沌？長老們認為他們可以。
81a0c977.english_text: Stop chaos? The Elders thought they could.

a722dcbe.text: 他們確實也『知道』了…你也應該如此。
a722dcbe.english_text: Now they know better. So should you.

f00124ba.text: 如果我們不能阻止混沌\255\001我們能做什麼？
f00124ba.english_text: If we can't stop the chaos,\255\001what CAN we do?

5e156f55.text: 天鵝從即將到來的黑暗時代中\255\001拯救了我們公會的其餘成員。\255\001現在，我們面前的道路已經清晰可見。\255\001\255\001我們必須找到我們的族群飛向何方，\255\001如果可以的話，加入他們吧！
5e156f55.english_text: The swan has rescued the\255\001rest of our Guild from the\255\001coming time of darkness.\255\001\255\001The way before us now\255\001is clear.\255\001\255\001We must find out where\255\001our flock has flown, and\255\001join them if we can!

3852863d.text: 很好！你找到了長老的織杖。\255\001永遠不要讓它離開你的手！
3852863d.english_text: You've already found\255\001the Elder's distaff.\255\001Good.\255\001\255\001Never let it out of\255\001your grasp!

91404604.text: 撿起長老的織杖，它現在屬於你了。\255\001永遠不要讓它離開你的手！
91404604.english_text: Pick up the Elder's\255\001distaff lying here.\255\001It is yours now.\255\001\255\001Never let it out of\255\001your grasp!

fc54578b.text: 一開始你可能無法用它編織出很多東西，\255\001我想。但隨著你練習的增多，\255\001它會向你展現出越來越多的力量。
fc54578b.english_text: You won't be able to\255\001weave very much with it\255\001at first, I expect.\255\001\255\001But as you gain practice,\255\001more and more of its power\255\001will reveal itself to you.

f4b34a6f.text: 只要織杖還在你手中，我就知道你很安全。\255\001如果你弄丟了織杖，別擔心！\255\001我會盡我所能幫助你。
f4b34a6f.english_text: As long as the distaff\255\001remains in your hands,\255\001I'll know you are safe.\255\001\255\001If you ever lose it,\255\001take heart! I'll come to\255\001help you if I can.

ff70eac4.text: 離開這個島，織機之子。\255\001它對你來說太小了！
ff70eac4.english_text: Leave this island, Loom-Child.\255\001It's too small for you now.

d27c5036.text: 你的命運就在大海的彼岸！
d27c5036.english_text: Your destiny lies beyond the sea!

f1afd66b.text: 希望我知道為什麼每個人都堅持\255\001叫我『織機之子』。
f1afd66b.english_text: Wish I knew why everyone keeps\255\001calling me +Loom-Child./

41a4884f.english_text: There's not a moment to lose!

a8313a3d.text: 你必須拆掉織機。現在，波賓。\255\001在死者掌控之前！
a8313a3d.english_text: You must unmake the Loom. NOW, Bobbin.\255\001Before the Dead Ones take control!

04a81398.text: 如何？我不知道該旋轉什麼織法！
04a81398.english_text: How? I don't know what draft to spin!

34c23c83.english_text: It is just as well, young Weaver.

4d9b099e.text: 鳥和小孩沒有資格\255\001掌握這種力量。
4d9b099e.english_text: Birds and children have no business\255\001wielding such power.

3e56863b.text: 我的線人告訴我\255\001我認為所有的\255\001織者都逃跑了。\255\001\255\001看來我的消息是錯的。
3e56863b.english_text: My informants told\255\001me that all of the\255\001Weavers had fled.\255\001\255\001I see they were\255\001mistaken.

cc631471.text: 命運一直很仁慈，\255\001我年輕的朋友。\255\001\255\001你會活到把公會的秘密傳承給\255\001其他更有資格\255\001的人。
cc631471.english_text: Destiny has been kind,\255\001my young friend.\255\001\255\001You will live to pass\255\001on your Guild's secrets\255\001to others more worthy\255\001of the knowledge.

ef99fc01.text: 作為回報，\255\001您將被允許為我的新帝國擔任顧問。\255\001當然，\255\001我希望\255\001您在這次歷史性的善意交換中\255\001給予全力合作。
ef99fc01.english_text: In return, you will be\255\001allowed to serve my new\255\001empire as advisor.\255\001\255\001Naturally, I expect your\255\001full cooperation in this\255\001historic exchange of\255\001goodwill.

230d63d3.text: 少一點就會\255\001冒著傷害我們的風險\255\001關係。
230d63d3.english_text: Anything less will\255\001risk harm to our\255\001relationship.

1ea656a6.english_text: The threads to unmake the Loom are ...

c1cc0e1a.text: 海切爾？海切爾，怎麼了？\255\001說些什麼！
c1cc0e1a.english_text: Hetchel? Hetchel, what's the matter?\255\001Say something!

e3f5d389.english_text: What did you do to her!

cdb9f897.text: 在不如我的人身邊，我很容易失去耐心。
cdb9f897.english_text: I lose patience easily in the proximity\255\001of inferior beings.

7cc42aef.text: 現在請您指導我如何使用這台神奇的儀器。
7cc42aef.english_text: You will now instruct me in the use\255\001of this fascinating instrument.

c8ce2c7d.text: 海切爾的羽毛！它還在那裡！

50449be5.text: 我會把留下它，\255\001作為我們的相遇的紀念。
50449be5.english_text: I shall keep it as a souvenir\255\001of our encounter.

9fb5d535.english_text: Looks as if breakfast is over.

e1af66b8.english_text: Shame to ruin the gull's breakfast.

d888e303.text: 這織法對蛤蜊不起作用。
d888e303.english_text: That draft won't work on the clam.

458e279b.text: 這織法對海鷗不起作用。
458e279b.english_text: That draft won't work on a gull.

65723b6f.english_text: Don't want to get any closer.

3b72a22f.text: 哇！聽聽這呼嘯的風聲吧！
3b72a22f.english_text: Whew! Listen to that twisty wind!

25bf1ae6.text: 那樣做不行。它轉得太快了。\255\001肯定有辦法把它解開…
25bf1ae6.english_text: That didn't work. It's twisting too fast.\255\001Must be SOME way to untwist it ...

fc160c52.text: 它已經擰得夠緊了！\255\001肯定有辦法把它解開…
fc160c52.english_text: It's twisting hard enough already!\255\001Must be SOME way to untwist it ...

fc5db5fc.text: 這織法對水龍捲不起作用。
fc5db5fc.english_text: That draft won't work on the waterspout.

ba5f64b3.text: 看起來好像有人在上面工作。
ba5f64b3.english_text: Looks as if somebody's\255\001working up there.

4d934be7.text: 我已經把織法轉給他們了！
4d934be7.english_text: I already spun that draft on them!

1004c0f0.text: 這織法現在不會影響他們了。
1004c0f0.english_text: That draft wouldn't affect them now.

42949d80.text: 感覺不錯。我認為它有效。
42949d80.english_text: That felt right. I think it worked.

52e9bd93.text: 這織法對工人不起作用。
52e9bd93.english_text: That draft won't work on the workers.

fa7910f2.text: 我懷疑他們能不能從上面看到我。
fa7910f2.english_text: I doubt if they'd see me\255\001from up there.

acf3dc90.text: +就在這裡，\255\001貴族玻璃製造商協會的創辦人，\255\001盧森特·博德布羅弗，\255\001獲得最終澄明。 /
acf3dc90.english_text: +Near this spot, Luscent Bottleblower,\255\001Founder of the Noble Guild of Glassmakers,\255\001attained his Final Clarity./

8ea78e98.text: +盧森特·博德布羅弗之妻——柔屑，\255\001於此獲得最終澄明。 /
8ea78e98.english_text: +Softshard, Wife of Luscent Bottleblower,\255\001here attained Final Clarity./

9766d04a.text: 這織法在墳墓上不起作用。
9766d04a.english_text: That draft won't work on the grave.

b277e5ea.text: 也許我不應該嘗試這樣做。
b277e5ea.english_text: Maybe I ought not to try that.

3e99fff0.text: 但請記住：弄壞了照價賠償！
3e99fff0.english_text: But remember: You break it, you buy it!

7ea7881b.english_text: That draft won't work on the bell.

6370f87b.text: 這織法對法球不起作用。
6370f87b.english_text: That draft won't work on the sphere.

c92b0725.english_text: Guess I'm not supposed to go up there.

4bb82691.english_text: Those guys are going to be a problem.

fe1e19e0.text: 看來我得想辦法\255\001偷偷溜過去。
fe1e19e0.english_text: Looks as if I'll have to try\255\001something sneaky.

5723bcef.english_text: Who ARE these two guys, anyway?

a114b3f9.text: 我勉強能聽清\255\001他們在說什麼…
a114b3f9.english_text: I can just make out what\255\001they're saying ...

22594cef.text: 我相信閣下對我們的進度\255\001還算滿意？
22594cef.english_text: I trust Your Excellency is pleased\255\001with our progress?

33e1ad23.english_text: How far ahead will I be able to see?

67b54e16.text: 至少四小時。運氣好的話，也許能到六小時。
67b54e16.english_text: At least four hours. With luck, maybe six.

a43f8a03.text: 六小時？我以為我們說好是八小時。
a43f8a03.english_text: Six hours? I thought we agreed to eight.

0b11fa8d.text: 每顆法球都是獨一無二的，\255\001曼迪布爾主教。
0b11fa8d.english_text: Each of the Spheres is unique,\255\001Bishop Mandible.

cb056661.text: 無法預測這顆特定的法球\255\001能看進多遠的未來。
cb056661.english_text: It is impossible to predict how deeply\255\001this particular Sphere will look.

96ae1687.text: 我需要至少提前看到八小時。
96ae1687.english_text: I need to see at least eight hours ahead.

b20b4a46.text: 八小時。確保能辦到，克魯斯堡大師。
b20b4a46.english_text: EIGHT hours. See to it, Master Crucible.

e23a3224.english_text: There's a little glass bell in here.

316eb10d.text: 他們還真是在磨那東西。

d1d8a165.english_text: How did you get up here?

dd240e88.text: 呃，我敲了這個小鐘，你看，然後…
dd240e88.english_text: Well, I rang this little bell, see, and ...

b725b2e0.english_text: Step back under the lens, please.

c079e289.text: 史托柏，我不是叫這小子離開了嗎？
c079e289.english_text: Stopper, didn't I ask this kid to leave?

9a14063e.english_text: But this is the only way to ...

0c4ac9f9.text: 聽著，你不該\255\001上來這裡，懂嗎？
0c4ac9f9.english_text: Look, you're NOT supposed to be\255\001up here, okay?

bb54aa0a.text: 要是被人看到你，\255\001我們都會有大麻煩。
bb54aa0a.english_text: We'll all be in BIG trouble\255\001if anybody sees you.

8d90fe53.text: 所以忘掉你在這裡看到的一切\255\001然後快滾。
8d90fe53.english_text: So forget what you saw here\255\001and SCRAM.

d4447c58.text: 這小子會害我們進度落後的！
d4447c58.english_text: The kid's gonna blow our schedule!

6e3aa4e0.english_text: C'mon, guys! I just want to ...

de6fb4ab.text: 聽著，我們在這裡有祕密工作要做。\255\001你知道「祕密」是什麼意思嗎？
de6fb4ab.english_text: Listen, we have secret work to do up here.\255\001You know what SECRET means?

cd14c930.text: 你休想在我們眼皮底下\255\001大搖大擺地走過去。
cd14c930.english_text: You are NOT going to waltz through here\255\001without us seeing you.

c8015d6b.text: 你看到那個曼迪布爾主教的嘴臉了嗎？
c8015d6b.english_text: Did you get a load o'that Bishop Mandible?

8bd98db9.text: 在這裡晃來晃去，好像這是他的地盤一樣！
8bd98db9.english_text: Swishin' 'round here like he owns the place!

68debb28.text: 話說回來，那些神職人員要\255\001窺視法球做什麼？
68debb28.english_text: What do the Clerics want with a\255\001Sphere of Scrying, anyway?

93905c61.text: 我還以為他們不相信\255\001未來這回事。
93905c61.english_text: Thought they didn't believe\255\001in the future.

28e6f3a2.english_text: Your guess is good as mine.

2d616808.text: 克魯斯堡覺得他們肯定\255\001又在搞什麼鬼。
2d616808.english_text: Crucible thinks they're up to\255\001no good again.

e1d063d6.text: 只要能先拿到現金，\255\001他連自己老媽的眼鏡都肯賣。
e1d063d6.english_text: He'd sell his own mother's spectacles\255\001if the terms were cash up front.

337a672f.text: 法球可不是什麼便宜貨。
337a672f.english_text: Spheres ain't what you call cheap.

c36e1960.text: 不過，克魯斯堡也不想冒險。
c36e1960.english_text: Still, Crucible's not takin' any chances.

05a3a75d.text: 他認為如果那些神職人員想\255\001找麻煩，我們最好有備無患。
05a3a75d.english_text: He figures if the Clerics are lookin'\255\001for trouble, we're gonna be ready.

6f8a90a1.text: 這就是為什麼你跟我要在這裡\255\001大肆加班的原因。
6f8a90a1.english_text: That's why you and me's up here\255\001doin' major overtime.

52a1bd05.text: 只要讓他們看一眼這小寶貝，那些\255\001神職人員想惹我們之前肯定會三思。
52a1bd05.english_text: One look at THIS little baby'll make them\255\001Clerics think twice 'bout messin' with US.

fa495df3.text: 如果他們看不見我，\255\001這織法也起不了多大作用。
fa495df3.english_text: That draft won't do much good\255\001if they can't see me.

387d09e3.text: 這織法對他們不起作用。
387d09e3.english_text: That draft won't work on them.

d084713d.text: 這織法對鐮刀不起作用。
d084713d.english_text: That draft won't work on the scythe.

41093ded.text: 真希望我已經到了能喝酒的年紀。
41093ded.english_text: Wish I was old enough to drink.

c8f91719.text: 不知道那條龍把博德布羅弗\255\001其他的寶物帶去哪了。
c8f91719.english_text: Wonder where that dragon went with\255\001Bottleblow's other treasures.

09b8cef1.english_text: It's already full to the brim.

1c660673.english_text: The chalice doesn't have a lid.

cdb569a0.text: 這織法對聖杯不起作用。
cdb569a0.english_text: That draft won't work on a chalice.

2c07e00a.text: 太美了！從沒見過像這樣閃閃發光的玻璃。
2c07e00a.english_text: Nice! Never seen glass sparkle like this.

962c54f5.english_text: It is not glass, Weaver Threadbare.

cb5965d2.text: 被你如此不敬地倒滿的聖杯，\255\001是用整塊鑽石雕刻而成的。
cb5965d2.english_text: The chalice you've so irreverently filled\255\001was carved from a diamond crystal.

cac8f8f8.text: 這個聖杯是由一整塊\255\001鑽石原石雕刻而成的。
cac8f8f8.english_text: This chalice was carved from a\255\001single crystal of diamond.

91111624.text: 但我以為你們是玻璃工匠。
91111624.english_text: But I thought you were Glassmakers.

ac77f878.text: 的確。請看這\255\001「克羅馬克斯之謎」！\255\001\255\001它出自我們\255\001創會成員\255\001盧森特·博德布羅弗\255\001之手，他的作品\255\001曾經擺滿了一整座博物館。
ac77f878.english_text: Indeed. Behold the\255\001Chromax Conundrum!\255\001\255\001It was wrought by\255\001the hand of our\255\001founding member,\255\001Luscent Bottleblow,\255\001whose works once\255\001filled a museum.

fa53ed97.text: 三個世紀前，\255\001我們美麗的城市\255\001遭到了一條龍的掠奪。\255\001\255\001那貪婪的野獸洗劫了\255\001我們的博物館和金庫。\255\001\255\001就連博德布羅弗最偉大的\255\001傑作——第一顆\255\001窺視法球，也遺失了。
fa53ed97.english_text: Three centuries ago,\255\001our fair city was\255\001plundered by a dragon.\255\001\255\001The greedy beast emptied\255\001our museum and treasury.\255\001\255\001Even Bottleblow's great\255\001masterpiece, the First\255\001Scrying Sphere, was lost.

d7a60340.text: 幸好，「克羅馬克斯之謎」\255\001當時借給了\255\001釀酒師公會。\255\001\255\001這是我們僅存的\255\001能展現博德布羅弗\255\001超凡才華的作品。
d7a60340.english_text: Fortunately, the\255\001Conundrum was on\255\001loan to the Guild of\255\001Vintners at the time.\255\001\255\001It is our only\255\001remaining example\255\001of Bottleblow's\255\001transcendent genius.

8bae9b5a.text: 但為什麼它是用鑽石做的，\255\001而不是玻璃？
8bae9b5a.english_text: But why is it made of diamond\255\001instead of glass?

5b326318.text: 這矮冬瓜正試圖溜進\255\001我們的領地！
5b326318.english_text: This runt was trying to sneak\255\001into our realm!

8a5327c3.text: 他還在兩座山頭外我就聽到了。
8a5327c3.english_text: I heard him coming two hills away.

dcaf7418.text: 說出你來找\255\001牧羊人公會的目的！
dcaf7418.english_text: State your business with the\255\001Guild of Shepherds!

aadd912e.english_text: I'm looking for a flock of swans.

d6def5f3.text: 孩子，天鵝可不住在樹林裡。
d6def5f3.english_text: Swans don't live in the woods, kid.

067f6614.text: 喂！你該不會以為這就是\255\001弗莉絲跟我們說的那個巫師吧？
067f6614.english_text: Say! You don't suppose this is the wizard\255\001Fleece told us about, do you?

273f5740.text: 唔。他的穿著有點像巫師。
273f5740.english_text: Hmm. He's dressed kind of like a wizard.

a4847ea6.english_text: Doesn't look very powerful to me.

caa7e9b8.text: 來吧，巫師！露兩手給我們看看。
caa7e9b8.english_text: C'mon, wizard! Show us your stuff.

151d48d9.text: 證明你是個巫師，否則你\255\001休想再往前走一步。
151d48d9.english_text: Prove you're a wizard or you're not\255\001getting any farther.

4ba8ec52.english_text: Not much of a wizard, eh?

433f8cdc.text: 這織法對牧羊人不起作用。
433f8cdc.english_text: That draft won't work on the shepherds.

9794a02d.text: 我們可是隱匿大師，\255\001小巫師。
9794a02d.english_text: We are the masters of stealth,\255\001little wizard.

7da9c794.text: 這種偽裝伎倆對我們不起作用。
7da9c794.english_text: That camouflage trick won't work on us.

21add0c6.text: 他們太聰明了，不會那麼容易被嚇到。
21add0c6.english_text: They're too smart to scare that easily.

1bcc8a3e.text: 沒用。我想牠們大概也不想\255\001看我吧。
1bcc8a3e.english_text: Didn't work. Guess they don't want\255\001to look at me anyway.

a101c0f4.english_text: That draft won't work on the sheep.

b582bcf2.text: 弗莉絲說得對。牠們真的太顯眼了。
b582bcf2.english_text: Fleece was right. They really do stick out.

cd61653f.text: 牠們已經白到不能再白了。
cd61653f.english_text: They're white as they can get already.

8a6cb0bb.text: 趁他睡著時做這事也沒什麼用。
8a6cb0bb.english_text: Wouldn't do any good while he's sleeping.

b0c2ff87.english_text: That draft won't work on him.

6c45ce0b.text: 有些墳墓看起來年代相當久遠。
6c45ce0b.english_text: Some of those graves look really old.

1a6675c1.text: 這織法對墓園不起作用。
1a6675c1.english_text: That draft won't work on the cemetery.

00984750.english_text: Look at my sheep! LOOK at them!

4bf1ec9e.text: 你對牠們做了什麼？\255\001牠們看起來蠢透了！
4bf1ec9e.english_text: What did you do to them?\255\001They look ridiculous!

089a5ce0.text: 你要我怎麼看管我幾乎\255\001看不見的羊群？
089a5ce0.english_text: How am I supposed to watch sheep\255\001I can barely SEE?

bd13fee9.english_text: You've got my sheep all upset!

0ebf611b.text: 現在我得重新把牠們趕攏。
0ebf611b.english_text: Now I gotta round 'em up again.

c997d63a.text: 牠們看起來已經蒼白到\255\001極點了。
c997d63a.english_text: They already look about as pale\255\001as they can get.

bb1080a1.english_text: Perhaps I shouldn't be trying that.

8d1b25ce.text: 這隻小羊看起來不太好。\255\001也許我不該打擾她。
8d1b25ce.english_text: This lamb doesn't look too well.\255\001Maybe I shouldn't bother her.

848c4f36.text: 這織法對小羊不起作用。
848c4f36.english_text: That draft won't work on the lamb.

319dec92.text: 你不是個很好奇的巫師，是嗎？
319dec92.english_text: Not a very curious wizard, are you?

3d6b2a09.text: 你對我這名小病患\255\001一點興趣也沒有。
3d6b2a09.english_text: You've shown not the slightest interest\255\001in my little patient here.

04f552fd.text: 你只是瞥了一眼\255\001我這名小病患。
04f552fd.english_text: You've only just glanced at\255\001my little patient here.

fbee228f.text: 啊！你注意到我的小病患了。
fbee228f.english_text: Ah! You've noticed my little patient.

b9766485.text: 病得很重。我不認為她撐得過去。
b9766485.english_text: Very. I don't think she's going to make it.

2a53317e.text: 她母親在生下她的隔天\255\001就被龍抓走了。
2a53317e.english_text: Her mother was carried off by the dragon\255\001the day after she gave birth.

d16d9440.text: 我的療癒之歌似乎起不了\255\001太大作用。
d16d9440.english_text: My Songs of Healing don't seem to\255\001be doing enough good.

04be58c4.text: 我們牧羊人就是以此聞名的。\255\001至少我是這麼認為。
04be58c4.english_text: We Shepherds are known for them.\255\001At least, I thought we were.

a3ff44a0.text: 我的祖父教過我這些魔法音符。
a3ff44a0.english_text: My grandsire taught me the magic notes.

d500dc29.text: 他說這是我們從其他公會那裡，\255\001用隱匿的秘密交換來的。
d500dc29.english_text: He said we got them from some other Guild\255\001in exchange for the secret of stealth.

b0537091.english_text: I guess I'm not very good yet.

9f1dbe5e.text: 我想她微微睜開了眼睛。
9f1dbe5e.english_text: I think she opened her eyes a little.

569093ed.text: 如果我唱得慢一點也許…
569093ed.english_text: Maybe if I sing a bit slower ...

cd4eb61a.text: 巫師，羊群已經被趕去牧場了。\255\001祝你對付龍時好運！
cd4eb61a.english_text: The flock has been led to pasture, Wizard.\255\001Good luck with the dragon!

ca67e5c4.text: 我就是派人來找你的那個人。
ca67e5c4.english_text: I am she who sent for you.

2eeb91aa.text: 我叫弗莉絲，是牧羊人公會\255\001的首選繼承人。
2eeb91aa.english_text: I am named Fleece, First Chosen\255\001of the Guild of Shepherds.

c9018412.text: 而你顯然就是我從法師公會\255\001雇來的強大巫師。
c9018412.english_text: And you are obviously the mighty wizard\255\001I hired from the Guild of Mages.

3b1c6169.text: 這中間一定有什麼誤會。

b03d0fa7.english_text: Your modesty is\255\001very charming.\255\001\255\001But there is no\255\001mistake.

6ef134dd.english_text: My border guards\255\001were extremely\255\001impressed with\255\001your display\255\001of magic power.

1101ad91.english_text: They did not\255\001tell me that you\255\001are also young,\255\001and quite\255\001well-mannered.

d1709739.text: 如果不是我們的處境\255\001如此嚴峻，\255\001我倒是有興趣\255\001好好\255\001認識你。
d1709739.english_text: Were our plight\255\001not so serious,\255\001it might amuse\255\001me to know you\255\001better.

5d6312d6.text: 我們的一位客戶下了一萬隻\255\001肥羊的訂單。
5d6312d6.english_text: One of our clients placed an order\255\001for ten thousand fattened sheep.

8d3a8d94.english_text: That's enough to feed an army!

61b62136.text: 我擔心這正是那些\255\001神職人員的打算。
61b62136.english_text: I fear that may be exactly what\255\001the Clerics have in mind.

730d04ed.text: 不過我們不會過問\255\001客戶如何使用我們的產品。
730d04ed.english_text: But we do not concern ourselves with\255\001how our customers use our products.

5ca2d7d6.text: 反正他們大概也無法拿到羊了。
5ca2d7d6.english_text: They probably won't get their sheep anyway.

d6222836.text: 我們這裡的龍似乎開始\255\001迷上了新鮮羊肉。
d6222836.english_text: Our local dragon seems to have acquired\255\001a taste for fresh mutton.

969037df.text: 我們的羊經過特別培育，毛色極白。\255\001牠在幾哩外就能看見牠們。
969037df.english_text: Our sheep are bred for extra whiteness.\255\001It can see them from miles away.

2cde0070.text: 只有法師才能拯救我們\255\001免受這長翅膀的瘟疫所害。
2cde0070.english_text: Only a mage can save us from\255\001this winged pestilence.

917a769e.text: 謝謝你這麼快就回應我的\255\001召喚。
917a769e.english_text: Thank you for answering my\255\001summons so quickly.

f74f4040.text: 弗莉絲！發生什麼事了？我們被擊潰了！
f74f4040.english_text: Fleece! What happened? We were overrun!

2e8eac4e.text: 多虧了那邊那個男孩的\255\001慈悲，你們才得救。
2e8eac4e.english_text: You were saved by the mercy\255\001of yonder boy.

b8dcb3f2.text: 自從上次見面後，他的力量又增強了。
b8dcb3f2.english_text: His power has grown since last we met.

bc225f80.text: 牧羊人恩怨分明，巫師。\255\001我不會忘記你的恩情。
bc225f80.english_text: Shepherds have long memories, wizard.\255\001I shall not forget your kindness.

1fd7a7c1.text: 快來！趕在那些死者回來\255\001再次收割我們之前！
1fd7a7c1.english_text: Come! Before the Dead Ones return\255\001to reap us again!

067aa5f2.text: 這裡的死者越來越多了。
067aa5f2.english_text: The Dead increased their numbers here.

f99bf604.text: 少數倖存的人也都在受苦。
f99bf604.english_text: Those few not killed are suffering.

a869684f.text: 至少我們可以結束他們的痛苦。\255\001如果可以的話，展現你的力量吧！
a869684f.english_text: At least we can end their misery.\255\001Extend your powers if you can!

dcb482c4.english_text: Guess I'll have to wake it first.

7fc9a145.text: 天哪！我們今天還真聰明！

06087d20.text: 離開前記得把它放回去就好。
06087d20.english_text: Just put it back before you leave.

c9116434.text: 很高興你還記得怎麼做。
c9116434.english_text: Glad you remembered how to do it.

e2dc121a.text: 這堆已經編織成這樣了。
e2dc121a.english_text: This pile's already spun that way.

95e6e16e.text: 哈欠！剛那一覺讓我肚子餓了。
95e6e16e.english_text: Yawn! That nap made me hungry.

58802da4.text: 呃喔。牠在稻草上打呼呢！
58802da4.english_text: Uh-oh. It's snoring on the straw!

76e4be85.english_text: That draft won't work on the dragon.

b4531014.english_text: Put it out! PUT IT OUT!

4d0519ec.text: 這一點都不好笑，年輕人。
4d0519ec.english_text: That was NOT funny, young man.

ea09a80b.english_text: That draft won't work on the gold.

e94ddd1c.text: 這織法對稻草不起作用。
e94ddd1c.english_text: That draft won't work on the straw.

eba4eef4.text: 這就是我太著急的下場。
eba4eef4.english_text: This is what I get for being in a hurry.

c2466b09.text: 我想你覺得自己有點骨瘦如柴吧。
c2466b09.english_text: Thought you felt a little scrawny.

316b6a92.text: 你的視線就是離不開我，對吧？
316b6a92.english_text: Can't keep your eyes off me, eh?

5d22ca5b.text: 你到底懂不懂規矩？\255\001別再盯著我看了！真是的！
5d22ca5b.english_text: Where'd you get your manners?\255\001Stop staring at me! Really!

eef570cb.english_text: Aw, forget it. Don't pay any\255\001attention to me.

b0e8ad0a.text: 我肚子餓的時候脾氣會很暴躁。
b0e8ad0a.english_text: I get crabby on an empty stomach.

5df0c9af.text: 你現在要把我燒成灰嗎？
5df0c9af.english_text: Are you gonna incinerate me now?

884cc5d2.english_text: Incinerate you?\255\001My! Aren't you the\255\001foxy one!\255\001\255\001You've come to the\255\001wrong lair if THAT's\255\001what you're after.

495c5c78.text: 聽著，親愛的。\255\001自從我上一次的\255\001交配季節後，我就再也沒\255\001噴過火了。\255\001\255\001而你絕對不會想\255\001知道那已經是\255\001多久以前的事了。
495c5c78.english_text: Listen, sweetie.\255\001I haven't done\255\001FIRE since my last\255\001mating season.\255\001\255\001And you don't WANT\255\001to know how long\255\001ago THAT was.

a30633ff.english_text: Those little tongues\255\001of flame running up\255\001and down my nostrils?\255\001Please!\255\001\255\001Too much heat for\255\001this old reptile.

f45a1e7d.text: 你的意思是說你不會噴火？
f45a1e7d.english_text: You mean you can't breathe fire?

453ef1a4.text: 是不想，親愛的。這不符合我的生活方式。
453ef1a4.english_text: WON'T, honey. Doesn't fit my lifestyle.

7e62d553.text: 只在你我之間說說，那些東西\255\001讓我覺得渾身發毛。
7e62d553.english_text: Just between you and me, the stuff\255\001gives me the willies.

d0a35db9.text: 想知道我的裝潢設計師是誰，對吧？\255\001嗯，你現在就看著她呢。
d0a35db9.english_text: Wondering who my decorator is, right?\255\001Well, you're looking at her.

b5d9d957.text: 跟這附近\255\001曾經擺放的東西\255\001比起來，\255\001這堆東西實在太可悲了。\255\001\255\001我以前曾收集過一大堆\255\001簡直美死人的\255\001水晶。說真的！
b5d9d957.english_text: This pile is SAD\255\001compared to what I\255\001USED to have lying\255\001around here.\255\001\255\001I picked up a load of\255\001crystal once that was\255\001to DIE for. Honestly!

43f0bc82.text: 你猜後來怎麼著？\255\001\255\001那個三流巫師\255\001竟然試圖撕裂我的\255\001火山。我們這裡可是\255\001發生了超級大地震。\255\001\255\001毀了我所有精緻的\255\001玻璃器皿。我讓那個\255\001男孩感到非常、非常後悔，\255\001告訴你吧。
43f0bc82.english_text: Then wouldn't you know?\255\001\255\001This third-rate wizard\255\001tries to rip apart my\255\001volcano. We're talking\255\001MAJOR earthquake here.\255\001\255\001Ruined ALL my fancy\255\001glassware. I made that\255\001boy very, VERY sorry,\255\001let me tell you.

7d30c156.text: 好不容易才救下一個\255\001小擺飾。\255\001\255\001那是顆最可愛的玻璃球。\255\001它是那麼地珍貴。\255\001\255\001但我又做了什麼？哈！\255\001居然把它掉在山下的\255\001洞穴裡。\255\001還沒等我抓住，\255\001它就滾走了。
7d30c156.english_text: Did manage to save one\255\001little knickknack.\255\001\255\001The loveliest glass ball.\255\001It was SO precious.\255\001\255\001So what did I do? Ha!\255\001Lost it in the caves\255\001under the mountain.\255\001Rolled away before I\255\001could grab it.

c999a245.text: 再也沒找回那個小寶貝。\255\001這就是人生啊。
c999a245.english_text: Never did find that puppy.\255\001C'est la vie.

bf27ffe1.english_text: That draft won't work on the pool.

5811baee.text: 我想我不會再從那裡回去了。
5811baee.english_text: Guess I won't be going back that way.

ad66a56d.text: 這種排列方式比較實用。
ad66a56d.english_text: This arrangement's a bit more usable.

22b6e5e2.text: 維修費用肯定要飆升了。

34e8582c.text: 它們看起來已經夠扭曲的了。

3b33446a.text: 我懷疑自己是否還能解開它們。
3b33446a.english_text: Doubt if I could untwist them any more.

9f2953f9.text: 這織法對台階不起作用。
9f2953f9.english_text: That draft won't work on the steps.

943fad47.text: 啊。現在不想看起來像他！
943fad47.english_text: Ugh. Don't want to look like him now!

62194a95.text: 這些墓碑是用金屬塊做成的。
62194a95.english_text: These grave markers are made\255\001from blocks of metal.

7ab816ac.text: 嘿！你看起來就像我一樣。
7ab816ac.english_text: Hey! You look just like me.

c1c70f1f.text: 只是別忘了在玩夠之後\255\001把我們換回來。
c1c70f1f.english_text: Just don't forget to switch us back\255\001when you're done fooling around.

fc2f7bd1.text: 哈欠！這些長袍確實很柔軟。
fc2f7bd1.english_text: Yawn! These robes sure are soft.

394723a4.english_text: Why'd you wake me up again?

2dc403df.english_text: Would you PLEASE let me get some sleep?

03a57e6a.text: 你休想離開。我是認真的！
03a57e6a.english_text: You're NOT leaving. I mean it!

3051fa51.text: 你和你的棍子讓我陷入了困境。
3051fa51.english_text: You and your stick got me into this mess.

4d15e735.text: 除非你幫我解決這個麻煩，\255\001否則你哪也別想去！
4d15e735.english_text: You're not going anywhere until\255\001you help me out!

641ba610.english_text: That's what you want, isn't it?

2d80cd47.text: 你受傷了。我治癒了你。\255\001就這樣。
2d80cd47.english_text: You were hurt. I healed you.\255\001That's all.

7bdd403a.english_text: I guess I ought to ... thank you.

26bc44ce.english_text: Don't. It's all my fault anyway.

b28238e1.text: 波賓，你能跟我一起去嗎？
b28238e1.english_text: Can you come with me, Bobbin?

231d81a7.text: 我得弄清楚我的公會其他成員\255\001\255\001到底發生了什麼事。
231d81a7.english_text: I've gotta find out what happened\255\001to the rest of my Guild.

90d25c5e.text: 抱歉。我也必須去做同樣的事。
90d25c5e.english_text: Sorry. I have to do the same thing.

c697cffe.text: 不過還是祝你好運。千萬小心。
c697cffe.english_text: Good luck, though. And be careful.

8e10775a.text: 你也是。祝你好運，我的……朋友。
8e10775a.english_text: You too. Good luck, my ... friend.

71577367.text: 所以我就像個乖巧的小幽靈一樣\255\001到「外頭」去等世界末日。
71577367.english_text: So I go Outside to wait for doomsday\255\001like a good little ghost.

b7b1d6ca.text: 那你覺得接下來會發生什麼事？
b7b1d6ca.english_text: And what do you suppose happens then?

3e79ac6c.text: 我不確定我該不該嘗試那個。
3e79ac6c.english_text: I'm not sure I should be trying that.

eec8a0e9.text: 誰在彈奏音樂？你把我吵醒了！
eec8a0e9.english_text: Who's playing music? You woke me up!

5f8c12ec.text: 以前從沒見過像你這樣打扮的人。
5f8c12ec.english_text: Never saw anyone dressed like you before.

c1ef58ab.text: 波賓·疏織，來自織者公會。

6cb00095.text: 織者啊？\255\001\255\001難怪你的篷這麼好看。
6cb00095.english_text: Weavers, huh?\255\001\255\001No wonder your\255\001cloak is so nice.

4ea8cfae.text: 我的本名是威爾羅特，但大家都叫我\255\001羅斯。\255\001\255\001羅斯·奈爾本德。
4ea8cfae.english_text: My real name is\255\001Wellwrought, but\255\001everyone calls me\255\001Rusty.\255\001\255\001Rusty Nailbender.

9cef5439.text: 我本來該去收集木柴的。\255\001\255\001但這片高地的木柴，早就被撿得一乾二淨了。
9cef5439.english_text: I'm supposed to be\255\001gathering firewood.\255\001\255\001But this plateau's\255\001been picked clean.

03f3b2e6.english_text: That's us. The Guild of Blacksmiths.

9b69b296.text: 我們的城市早在「陰影」出現之前就存在了。
9b69b296.english_text: Our city's been here since before\255\001the Shadows.

94a230ae.text: 所以。是什麼風把織者吹來這裡的？
94a230ae.english_text: So. What brings a Weaver to these parts?

d110936b.text: 我在找一群天鵝。\255\001你有看到牠們從這經過嗎？
d110936b.english_text: I'm looking for a flock of swans.\255\001Did you see any pass this way?

d1c355dd.text: 抱歉。這附近沒天鵝。\255\001不過禿鷹倒是不少。
d1c355dd.english_text: Sorry. No swans around here.\255\001Plenty of vultures, though.

086fad6b.text: 哈欠！欠！所有這些談話讓我昏昏欲睡。
086fad6b.english_text: Yawn! All this talk makes me sleepy.

b7d7d286.text: 如果你找到你的天鵝叫醒我。\255\001以前從未見過。
b7d7d286.english_text: Wake me if you find your swans.\255\001Never seen one before.

caa8248b.text: 那個織者小子竟然這樣搞我！
caa8248b.english_text: That Weaver kid did this to me!

271832c4.text: 現在我必須在外面等待。
271832c4.english_text: Now I have to wait Outside.

881997ce.text: 如果我能把手伸到他身上...
881997ce.english_text: If I ever get my hands on him ...

251c8522.text: 回到織圖裡！這還挺簡單的。
251c8522.english_text: Back to the Pattern! That was easy.

debbfa06.text: 可惜得有人死掉\255\001我才能回來。
debbfa06.english_text: Pity that someone has to die\255\001for me to return.

9120a33b.english_text: Now where can Bobbin have gone?

baeb0471.text: 那些鐵匠生性多疑。\255\001他們絕不會讓織者進去的。
baeb0471.english_text: Those Smiths are a suspicious lot.\255\001They'd never let a Weaver inside.

a2d886ee.english_text: Perhaps I ought to look into this.

915149ac.text: 哎呀，哎呀。看看是誰來了。

43cf8801.text: 是這樣，波賓，老兄，\255\001事情的經過大概是這樣的。\255\001\255\001我正躺在這裡，這時有個奇怪的新小子出現了，\255\001還決定他想要跟我互換衣服。
43cf8801.english_text: Well, Bobbin, old buddy,\255\001I think it went something\255\001like this.\255\001\255\001I'm lying here, minding\255\001my own business, when this\255\001strange new kid shows up\255\001and decides he wants to\255\001switch clothes with me.

b350b73a.text: 我想，『嘿！那又怎樣？\255\001找點樂子嘛，對吧？\255\001我們隨時都可以再換回來。』\255\001\255\001於是這小子就走掉了，\255\001看起來變得跟我一模一樣。\255\001\255\001很好。只有一個問題。
b350b73a.english_text: I figure, +Hey! So what?\255\001Have a little fun, right?\255\001We can always switch back\255\001again later./\255\001\255\001So this kid walks away\255\001looking just like me.\255\001\255\001Fine. Only one problem.

e1b53fea.text: 這小子忘了提他惹上了一條四十呎長的龍，\255\001正到處在找他。\255\001\255\001而當那條龍看到我躺在這裡，\255\001長得就跟你一樣時，\255\001會發生什麼事呢？
e1b53fea.english_text: The kid forgets to\255\001mention that he has a\255\001FORTY-FOOT DRAGON out\255\001to get him.\255\001\255\001And what happens when\255\001that very same dragon\255\001sees me lying here?\255\001\255\001Looking JUST LIKE YOU?

a130846f.english_text: I don't know what to say.

67f13d75.text: 總而言之，我落得這步田地。死了。
67f13d75.english_text: Anyway, I end up like this. Dead.

55f6e6e6.text: 某個白痴撕裂了宇宙，\255\001把我們全都『拉回來』了！
55f6e6e6.english_text: Some idiot rips the universe apart\255\001and hauls us all back Inside!

7a61d1a0.text: 很多死者為此感到非常火大。
7a61d1a0.english_text: A lot of Dead Ones are really upset.

e632914b.text: 事實上，他們中有些人已經決定\255\001要接管這個世界。
e632914b.english_text: In fact, some of them have decided\255\001to take over the world.

f41e7bf7.text: 這午睡的地點還真奇怪。
f41e7bf7.english_text: Strange place to take a nap.

492b60f6.text: 這織法對大門不起作用。
492b60f6.english_text: That draft won't work on the gate.

22bdc229.text: 史托克正在找你。\255\001他看起來氣炸了！
22bdc229.english_text: Stoke is looking for you.\255\001He sure looks mad!

4286a026.english_text: You'd better get in there quickly!

e3e29dc6.english_text: Let me open the gate for you.

2cb880f3.text: 還在外面晃啊，奈爾本德？

dc7e2fc6.english_text: Stoke's looking for you in there.

d6083150.english_text: I'll open up for you again.

47937401.text: 史托克真的非常生氣了，奈爾本德！

24aaa98b.text: 如果我是你，我現在就會馬上進去。
24aaa98b.english_text: I'd get in there NOW if I were you.

e099ff00.text: 到底是誰一直把門關上？

9f0e5718.text: 這是你自找的，奈爾本德。

b5863a9f.text: 是我啦。一位友善的陌生人。

73ee308b.text: 這是一個私人公會，\255\001這位奇怪的年輕朋友。
73ee308b.english_text: This is a private Guild, my\255\001strange young friend.

b8b243b2.text: 大門只對工會會員開放。
b8b243b2.english_text: The gate opens for members only.

515e50d2.text: 現在快走開，去別的地方玩。
515e50d2.english_text: Now go away and play somewhere else.

ebc72228.text: 這不是那位友善的陌生人嗎。哈！
ebc72228.english_text: If it isn't the Friendly Stranger. Haw!

3c182ae0.text: 我以為我叫你去別的地方玩了。
3c182ae0.english_text: Thought I told you to go play\255\001somewhere else.

3c5c82b1.text: 這扇門謝絕陌生人進入。\255\001懂了嗎？
3c5c82b1.english_text: This gate is CLOSED to strangers.\255\001Get the idea?

fd076057.text: 孩子，你也許很友善，\255\001但你腦筋似乎不太靈光。
fd076057.english_text: You may be friendly, kid, but you're\255\001not too bright.

4b3bf625.text: 你休想通過這扇門。懂嗎？
4b3bf625.english_text: You are NOT going past this gate.\255\001Understand?

98b385b8.text: 我當班時總會遇到一堆怪咖。
98b385b8.english_text: I get all the kooks on my shift.

dc63bed9.text: 我最好別穿成這樣回去。
dc63bed9.english_text: I'd better not go back there dressed like this.

e3e869f7.text: 它已經滿到不能再滿了。
e3e869f7.english_text: It's already as full as it can get.

e7e2ba24.text: 它已經空得不能再空了。
e7e2ba24.english_text: It's already as empty as it can get.

94f0b10a.text: 這織法對木箱不起作用。
94f0b10a.english_text: That draft won't work on the wood bin.

f66289ba.text: 這不是我那忠誠、不知疲倦的學徒\255\001\255\001羅斯·奈爾本德嗎。
f66289ba.english_text: If it isn't my faithful, TIRELESS\255\001apprentice, Rusty Nailbender.

6d91fe9d.text: 看看啊！他給我帶回了一根木柴。
6d91fe9d.english_text: And look! He's brought me a stick of wood.

e1197d49.text: 而且就只有『一根』彎曲的破木柴\255\001要來餵給我那可憐、飢餓的火爐。
e1197d49.english_text: Exactly ONE crooked old stick of firewood\255\001for my poor, starving furnace.

f8294976.text: 你這個懶惰的白痴！\255\001\255\001我在『四個小時前』\255\001派你去收集木柴，\255\001結果你居然敢只拿『一根破木棍』回來？
f8294976.english_text: You lazy idiot!\255\001\255\001I sent you out FOUR\255\001HOURS ago to gather\255\001firewood, and you\255\001DARE to come back with\255\001ONE LOUSY STICK?

932a4d57.text: 要不是你父親是領班，\255\001我早就把你丟進火爐裡了。\255\001\255\001算你走運，他現在正和主教在樓下。
932a4d57.english_text: If your father wasn't\255\001the Foreman, I'd toss\255\001YOU in the furnace.\255\001\255\001Lucky for you he's\255\001downstairs with the\255\001Bishop right now.

3af86876.text: 如果那個火爐熄滅了，\255\001神職人員的劍就會遲交。\255\001\255\001也許你會有興趣\255\001親自去向主教\255\001請求寬恕？\255\001\255\001我很樂意幫你安排！
3af86876.english_text: If that furnace goes\255\001out, the Clerics'\255\001swords will be LATE.\255\001\255\001Perhaps you'd care\255\001to ask the Bishop for\255\001forgiveness in person?\255\001\255\001Happy to arrange it!

8546b71b.english_text: I know what to do with you.

6583ac4b.text: 所有的稻草都已經紡出來了。
6583ac4b.english_text: All the straw's been spun out already.

f28e91d1.text: 所有的金幣都已經被轉出來了。
f28e91d1.english_text: All the gold's been spun out already.

6051bc4f.text: 這織法在這裡不起作用。
6051bc4f.english_text: That draft won't work on the pile.

a75dc4fb.english_text: That draft won't work on the door.

f3f21184.text: 現在我又可以大顯身手了！

e0789371.text: 鎖上了。而我竟然沒有織杖！
e0789371.english_text: Locked. And me without a distaff!

a313633a.text: 這稻草堆一定被編入了沉睡織法
a313633a.english_text: This straw must have a sleep draft\255\001spun into it.

ffaeb1ed.text: 反正沒織杖，我也做不了什麼事…
ffaeb1ed.english_text: Can't do much without my\255\001distaff anyway ...

fbcef466.text: 竟然嚇唬像我這樣\255\001可憐又手無寸鐵的老傢伙！太過分了！
fbcef466.english_text: Imagine frightening a poor, defenseless\255\001old thing like me! Honestly!

806a0146.text: 嗯，我可能不太會用火，親愛的。
806a0146.english_text: Well, I may not be much good\255\001with fire, sweetie.

f6dce05e.text: 但…我喜歡吃…年輕、緊實的肉！
f6dce05e.english_text: But young, firm MEAT is something\255\001I can REALLY sink my teeth into!

dfb35db5.text: 我的長袍已經沒有偽裝效果了。

0e4c89c8.text: 還有一萬把劍等著鍛造，火爐卻快熄滅了！
0e4c89c8.english_text: Ten thousand swords to forge,\255\001and the furnace almost cold!

1bb29c34.text: 這下我的新辦公傢俱泡湯了。
1bb29c34.english_text: Here goes my new office furniture.

a87a1803.text: 要是阿特羅波斯長老看到\255\001他的織杖被這樣對待，他會怎麼說？
a87a1803.english_text: What would Elder Atropos say if\255\001he saw his distaff treated so?

5e6b087a.text: 拿到了！可不能把羽毛給燒焦了。
5e6b087a.english_text: Got it! Mustn't singe the feathers.

8605d593.text: 謝天謝地，他終於不再敲打它了！
8605d593.english_text: Thank goodness he stopped banging on it!

f21c05e6.english_text: That draft won't work on the sword.

e436a874.text: 等他敲打完後，\255\001那將會是一把極其兇狠的劍。
e436a874.english_text: That's gonna be one nasty sword when\255\001he's done banging on it.

cd90d182.english_text: Hard to be nosy with all this noise!

4e32c829.text: 好在他們必須用吼的\255\001才能聽見彼此的聲音。
4e32c829.english_text: Good thing they have to shout\255\001to hear themselves.

d8cd31ab.text: 就在我們說話的同時，最後的刀刃\255\001也正在磨礪中，閣下。
d8cd31ab.english_text: The final blade is being sharpened\255\001even as we speak, Your Excellency.

24d1b655.text: 我最熟練的鑄劍師\255\001正在親自監督。
24d1b655.english_text: My most skillful bladeshaper is\255\001seeing to it personally.

f8153f52.text: 那麼這將是個歷史性的時刻，\255\001奈爾本德領班。
f8153f52.english_text: Then this is an historic moment,\255\001Foreman Nailbender.

21cdb8ce.text: 第一萬把劍的鍛造，\255\001標誌著我們準備工作的完成。
21cdb8ce.english_text: The forging of the ten thousandth sword\255\001marks the end of our preparations.

80183ecb.text: 磨刃進度如何，艾奇懷斯？

e64846ff.text: 這塊金屬很傲骨，領班！\255\001它沒那麼容易屈服。
e64846ff.english_text: This metal is proud, Foreman!\255\001It does not yield easily.

99e1e550.text: 更多的汗水能軟化它吧，我相信？
99e1e550.english_text: More sweat will soften it, I trust?

16d6f462.text: 這將是一把不容小覷的利刃！
16d6f462.english_text: It shall be a blade to be reckoned with!

27432c5a.english_text: +The Blade of Reckoning./ I like it.

0477388c.text: 它帶著一種世界末日的氣息。
0477388c.english_text: It has a certain apocalyptic flair.

04a6efac.text: 我猜你的鑄劍師不會\255\001讓我等太久吧？
04a6efac.english_text: I assume your bladeshaper won't\255\001keep me waiting much longer?

10e7302c.text: 金屬屈服了嗎，艾奇懷斯？

cd26aea2.text: 我要把它敲打到屈服為止！
cd26aea2.english_text: I shall pound it into submission!

f3eb2a4b.text: 更用力的敲擊或許能縮短你的工時。\255\001我們慷慨的客戶已經開始不耐煩了。
f3eb2a4b.english_text: Harder pounding may shorten your labor.\255\001Our generous client grows impatient.

82662ae4.text: 只有時間才能塑造出如此高貴的鋼材。\255\001但我會加倍努力的！
82662ae4.english_text: Only time can shape such noble steel.\255\001But I will double my efforts!

40d7bd3a.text: 只要一看到他正在磨礪的這把利刃，\255\001頭骨都會自行裂開，主教！
40d7bd3a.english_text: Skulls will cleave at the mere sight of\255\001the edge he is sharpening, Bishop!

1c741a14.text: 我從未懷疑過\255\001你們商品的做工。
1c741a14.english_text: I have never doubted the workmanship\255\001of your merchandise.

079ed213.text: 事實上，你們鐵匠給我帶來的麻煩\255\001比任何其他公會都少。
079ed213.english_text: In fact, you Blacksmiths have caused me\255\001less trouble than any other Guild.

ca5477e8.text: 你們的忠誠服務將不會被遺忘，\255\001在即將到來的審判時刻。
ca5477e8.english_text: Your loyal service will not be forgotten\255\001in the hour of judgement soon to come.

0430ce53.text: 領班！這是什麼邪門歪道？

e5e49846.text: 有女巫的詛咒降臨在這把劍上了！
e5e49846.english_text: A witch's curse has befallen the blade!

bbfca0ef.english_text: The edge has been mischievously twisted!

6e386a84.text: 劍刃被惡作劇給弄鈍了！
6e386a84.english_text: The edge has been mischievously blunted!

03dd7d66.text: 詛咒，艾奇懷斯？我看不見得。
03dd7d66.english_text: A curse, Edgewise? I think not.

bf0ac8a6.text: 我可不相信女巫的詛咒\255\001能徹底搞砸我的計畫。
bf0ac8a6.english_text: I'd hate to believe that a witch's curse\255\001could so thoroughly ruin my schedule.

3f19bc02.text: 你難道不認為那個一直\255\001在偷窺我們的人與此有關嗎？
3f19bc02.english_text: You don't suppose that fellow who's been\255\001spying on us has anything to do with it?

7f5ee762.text: 也許他會很樂意陪我回\255\001我的大教堂去。
7f5ee762.english_text: Perhaps he'd care to accompany me back\255\001to my cathedral.

9990bc06.text: 我也許有新的『詛咒』可以教教他。
9990bc06.english_text: I may have new curses to teach him.

208fb197.english_text: Maybe that isn't such a good idea.

5c7ed279.text: 艾奇懷斯！那把劍磨利了嗎？
5c7ed279.english_text: Edgewise! Is that blade sharp yet?

335dec39.text: 只有時間才能讓這把駭人的利刃\255\001更加完美，尊貴的大人。
335dec39.english_text: Only time can improve this fearsome\255\001blade, O Reverent One.

4b67f419.text: 還沒達到我技術所能及的最鋒利程度！
4b67f419.english_text: Not as sharp as my skill can make it!

e6abc321.text: 那你怎麼知道什麼時候才算完成？
e6abc321.english_text: How will you know when it's finished?

45b544b1.text: 這鋼鐵會發出屈服的清脆聲響，\255\001至高無上的大人。
45b544b1.english_text: The steel will ring out its defeat,\255\001Most Exalted One.

8b00a724.text: 那就讓它響吧！敲大力點！
8b00a724.english_text: Make it ring, then! Pound harder!

e457a11f.text: 我們怎能用次等刀刃\255\001來裝配主教的劍柄呢？
e457a11f.english_text: Shall we crown the Bishop's hilt with\255\001less than the finest of blades?

18b339d3.text: 我很欣賞你的工藝，艾奇懷斯。\255\001但你就不能加快一點速度嗎？
18b339d3.english_text: I appreciate your artistry, Edgewise.\255\001But can't you speed things up a bit?

ead318a7.text: 好金屬會回報你的耐心，\255\001不滅的大人。

ec88153d.text: 我們的客戶會回報快速的服務！敲！
ec88153d.english_text: Our clients reward quick service! POUND!

03dcc8d1.text: 真是個討人喜歡的傢伙，是吧？

54b55f91.text: 這織法對籠子不起作用。
54b55f91.english_text: That draft won't work on the cage.

5f6d7716.text: 請容許我自我介紹一下。

a3fc883b.text: 我是曼迪布爾主教，神職人員\255\001反世俗秘密會議的終極使徒。
a3fc883b.english_text: I am Bishop Mandible, Transultimate Apostle\255\001of the Antisecular Conclave of Clerics.

c1de5a2c.text: 我是不是該跪下什麼的？
c1de5a2c.english_text: Am I supposed to kneel or something?

eb300be0.text: 你的斗篷和法杖\255\001暴露了你的來歷。\255\001\255\001我在大學時\255\001研究過關於你們公會\255\001的傳說。
eb300be0.english_text: Your cloak and staff\255\001betray your origin.\255\001\255\001I studied the lore\255\001of your Guild at\255\001university.

1ddeda59.english_text: It's been quite a\255\001long time since any\255\001Weaver dared to set\255\001foot off that dreary\255\001rock you call home.\255\001\255\001+Loom./\255\001\255\001So provincial.

c0469af4.text: 我不禁好奇\255\001是什麼驅使你\255\001現在離開那裡的。
c0469af4.english_text: I can't help but\255\001wonder what impelled\255\001you to leave it now.

b230972d.english_text: His Excellency asked you a question!

550e7df7.text: 我去拿那些『說服工具』\255\001好嗎，閣下？
550e7df7.english_text: Shall I fetch the Instruments of\255\001Persuasion, Excellence?

0c1b3b4d.text: 請原諒我助手的敵意。\255\001恐怕柯布沒見過什麼世面。
0c1b3b4d.english_text: Forgive the hostility of my assistant.\255\001I fear Cob is not very worldly.

3264026b.text: 他不知道一名\255\001織者能有多危險。
3264026b.english_text: He does not realize how dangerous\255\001a Weaver can be.

ba96116b.text: 你以為你這個鐵籠子\255\001關得住這個男孩嗎？
ba96116b.english_text: Do you think this iron cage of yours\255\001is enough to hold the boy captive?

c9bf19e5.text: 要知道，他根本連想都不用想\255\001就能輕易把它打開。
c9bf19e5.english_text: Why, he could burst it wide open\255\001with hardly a second thought.

27eb38be.text: 但是閣下！我每個星期二\255\001都有檢查鎖啊！
27eb38be.english_text: But Excellence! I inspect the locks\255\001every Tuesday!

602599e9.text: 仔細看著學學吧，我的僕人。

3a7415c2.text: 即使是現在，你的囚犯也正在計畫逃跑。
3a7415c2.english_text: Even now, your prisoner plans his escape.

9efe5e29.text: 看到了嗎，柯布？，\255\001這些織者真是難以捉摸
9efe5e29.english_text: You see, Cob? An elusive breed,\255\001these Weavers.

6ad364fe.text: 幸運的是，如果他們沒有編織木棍，\255\001就毫無反抗之力了。
6ad364fe.english_text: Luckily, they are quite helpless\255\001without their weaving sticks.

739525a2.text: 你竟敢對閣下\255\001大聲嚷嚷？
739525a2.english_text: You dare raise your voice\255\001at His Excellency?

e1535baa.text: 好了，好了，柯布！我們不該\255\001對我們的客人無禮。
e1535baa.english_text: Now, now, Cob! We mustn't be\255\001rude to our guest.

103e3502.text: 尤其在他好心為我們帶來\255\001這麼一份大禮之後。
103e3502.english_text: Not after he was kind enough to bring\255\001us such a magnificent gift.

51d2771b.text: 曼迪布爾！那把織杖永遠不會為你效力的。
51d2771b.english_text: Mandible! That distaff will\255\001never work for you.

35b3b217.text: 你錯了，我傲慢的年輕朋友。
35b3b217.english_text: You are wrong, my arrogant young friend.

3da98ac6.text: 來。讓我示範給你看為什麼。
3da98ac6.english_text: Come. Let me show you why.

b39b4631.text: 你聽到至高無上者的命令了。走！
b39b4631.english_text: You heard the Exalted One. Move it!

3f431ed5.text: 在墓園裡，\255\001生與死之間的界線是…模糊的。
3f431ed5.english_text: In a graveyard, the boundary between the\255\001Living and the Dead is ... indistinct.

d3df6ae0.text: 你們織者會說這裡的織圖\255\001很脆弱。薄如輕紗。
d3df6ae0.english_text: You Weavers would say that the Pattern\255\001here is fragile. Thin as gauze.

7ad056d8.text: 不只是這裡。每個墓園都是如此。
7ad056d8.english_text: Not just here. Every graveyard is like that.

0408ad1b.text: 現在，想像一下如果這道\255\001脆弱的界線被打破了，會發生什麼事。
0408ad1b.english_text: Now, imagine what might happen if this\255\001delicate boundary was somehow breached.

3e2301fe.text: 你不能就這樣把織圖\255\001像塊破布一樣撕碎。
3e2301fe.english_text: You can't just rip the Pattern\255\001apart like an old rag.

acd4e197.text: 但我可以。我可以！\255\001\255\001我只需要一把\255\001織者的織杖，以及\255\001『開啟』織法的四個音符。\255\001\255\001謝謝你這麼輕易地\255\001就把這兩樣東西都交給了我。
acd4e197.english_text: But I can. I can!\255\001\255\001All I require is a\255\001Weaver's distaff, and\255\001the four threads of\255\001an Opening draft.\255\001\255\001Thank you for supplying\255\001both so readily.

ab7f9220.text: 當界線被\255\001打破，死者\255\001將如潮水般湧回\255\001生者的世界，\255\001渴望奪回他們\255\001在我們之中的地位！\255\001\255\001而我將會等待\255\001他們。準備獻上\255\001我在精神領導方面\255\001豐富的專業知識。
ab7f9220.english_text: When the boundary is\255\001breached, the Dead\255\001will stream back onto\255\001the plane of the Living,\255\001eager to reclaim their\255\001place among us!\255\001\255\001And I will be waiting\255\001for them. Ready to offer\255\001my vast expertise in\255\001spiritual leadership.

824b4442.english_text: I shall preside over\255\001a teeming multitude\255\001of restless shades.\255\001\255\001Immortal. Invincible.\255\001\255\001An Army of the Dead!\255\001With myself as its\255\001supreme commander.

7cb60cd6.text: 一支以牧羊人的肉\255\001為食的軍隊。
7cb60cd6.english_text: An army nourished by the\255\001meat of the Shepherds.

9cfbadd9.text: 裝備著鐵匠們\255\001打造的利劍。
9cfbadd9.english_text: Armed with the swords\255\001of the Blacksmiths.

d33aa6a9.text: 並由玻璃工匠們的\255\001法球來指引！
d33aa6a9.english_text: And guided by the\255\001Sphere of the Glassmakers!

7596fa0c.text: 我本來打算用其他更強硬的手段\255\001來召喚死者。
7596fa0c.english_text: I was preparing to invoke the Dead\255\001by other, more forceful means.

b102f25a.text: 就在那時，玻璃工匠送來了我的法球。\255\001它預示了你將會適時到來。
b102f25a.english_text: Then the Glassmakers delivered my Sphere.\255\001It foretold your convenient arrival.

14984c8d.text: 現在它讓我看到鐵匠們正在修復\255\001那把你試圖毀掉的劍。
14984c8d.english_text: Now it shows me the Smiths repairing\255\001the sword you tried to ruin.

94103e6f.text: 神職人員的時代很快\255\001就要降臨了！
94103e6f.english_text: The Age of the Clerics will soon\255\001be upon us!

fe05e8a5.text: 柯布，別讓他離開你的視線。
fe05e8a5.english_text: Cob, don't let him out of your sight.

cb25e891.text: 而且別讓他碰任何東西。
cb25e891.english_text: And don't let him touch anything.

ab0b78d2.text: 曼迪布爾大帝。宇宙的統治者！
ab0b78d2.english_text: Lord Mandible. Ruler of the Universe!

21c7ef9c.text: 是時候換換我的信箋抬頭了。

04889d8c.text: 現在沒那麼危險了吧？\255\001嘿嘿嘿。
04889d8c.english_text: Not so dangerous now, are you?\255\001Heh, heh, heh.

2258f422.text: 閣下吩咐過不准碰任何東西。
2258f422.english_text: His Excellence said not to touch anything.

2917a252.text: 我也沒想碰它。\255\001只是看看而已。就這樣。
2917a252.english_text: I wasn't going to touch it.\255\001Just looking. That's all.

e126d03f.text: 如果你讓我看個東西，\255\001我就讓你看看法球。
e126d03f.english_text: I'll let you look into the Sphere\255\001if you let ME look at something.

79386f56.english_text: What did you have in mind?

ad5a2c9b.text: 傳說如果看到\255\001脫下兜帽的織者，\255\001就會招致死亡。
ad5a2c9b.english_text: Legends say it is\255\001death to gaze upon\255\001a Weaver uncloaked.

f4d546ce.text: 當然，我們神職人員\255\001才不信這種\255\001無稽之談。\255\001\255\001不過，我倒是…挺好奇的。
f4d546ce.english_text: Naturally, we Clerics\255\001pay little heed to such\255\001foolish rumors.\255\001\255\001Still, I'm ... curious.

5eb7485c.text: 只要你讓我掀起你的兜帽，\255\001我就讓你看這顆法球。\255\001\255\001成交？
5eb7485c.english_text: I'll let you look into\255\001this Sphere if you let\255\001me lift your hood.\255\001\255\001Deal?

f6672a4b.text: 如果我是你，就不會那麼做。
f6672a4b.english_text: I wouldn't try that if I were you.

2285bee9.text: 為什麼不？你那件漂亮的長袍底下\255\001應該沒什麼好怕的，不是嗎？
2285bee9.english_text: Why not? There's nothing to fear under\255\001that fine robe of yours, is there?

6bc2491c.text: 如果你『什麼都不怕』，那你\255\001最好別碰我。
6bc2491c.english_text: If you fear Nothing, then you'd\255\001better not touch me.

6af1b7d2.english_text: Ah, a riddle! I like riddles.

7e0bfb42.text: 就讓我們一勞永逸地\255\001解開這個謎題吧？
7e0bfb42.english_text: Let's answer this little riddle\255\001once and for all, shall we?

b9504a8d.text: 不…不！…啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！

bdd55cef.text: 他在那裡尖叫成那樣，\255\001我要怎麼召喚死者？
bdd55cef.english_text: How am I supposed to invoke the Dead\255\001with all that screaming in there?

07795cde.text: 這可不能怪我沒警告過他。
07795cde.english_text: Can't say I didn't warn him.

631abbf8.text: 看來柯布真是怠忽職守。
631abbf8.english_text: I see Cob is being lax in his duties.

d451a6df.text: 無所謂。你來得正好，\255\001可以見證新時代的曙光。
d451a6df.english_text: No matter. You're just in time to\255\001witness the dawn of a new era.

2d7d42e4.text: 你根本不知道你在做什麼，\255\001曼迪布爾！
2d7d42e4.english_text: You don't know what you're\255\001doing, Mandible!

30d8c5e8.text: 織圖已經夠殘破了。\255\001如果你現在在上面撕開一個洞…
30d8c5e8.english_text: The Pattern is worn enough already.\255\001If you rip a hole in it now ...

dd543209.text: 省省你那套織者的神秘主義吧。

c6bb5e55.english_text: No more shall the Dead envy the Living!

10838d26.text: 哇！你一定是打開了\255\001方圓五十哩內所有的東西！
10838d26.english_text: Wow! You must've opened everything\255\001within fifty miles of here!

65849056.english_text: Including the eyes of the Dead. Behold!

aefffba1.text: 我有種非常不祥的預感。
aefffba1.english_text: I have a very bad feeling about this.

767af1eb.text: 誰敢打擾\255\001長眠者的安寧？
767af1eb.english_text: Who dares disturb the peace\255\001of Those Who Sleep?

28f569e9.english_text: Who have I the honor of summoning?

caab88c9.text: 看來距離我上次造訪\255\001已經過太久了。
caab88c9.english_text: I see it has been too long\255\001since my last visit.

9c408c2e.text: 看來我是抓不住這東西了。
9c408c2e.english_text: Can't seem to hold on to this thing.

7040a023.text: 那隻怪獸看起來很餓。\255\001還是待在外面比較好！
7040a023.english_text: That beast looked hungry.\255\001Better stay out here!

9b4f35c5.text: 看來我的倒影織法\255\001在這裡起不了作用。
9b4f35c5.english_text: Looks as if my reflection threads\255\001don't work out here.

aa25f147.english_text: This hole is already wide open.

bb53ead3.text: 也許我該先\255\001四處探索一下。
bb53ead3.english_text: Maybe I should do some more\255\001exploring first.

28866d73.text: 最後一個洞了。現在我可以去追海切爾了！
28866d73.english_text: Last hole. Now I can go after Hetchel!

a0111b20.text: 她的眼睛。就像我的一樣…

546b31be.english_text: That draft won't work on her.

c9b0dbdb.text: 我在哪裡？這是什麼地方？
c9b0dbdb.english_text: Where am I? What is this place?

a73321e4.english_text: Home of the Dead, and of those Transcended.

a40e1201.text: 沒錯，波賓！而你是第一個\255\001用凡胎肉眼見到這裡的人。
a40e1201.english_text: Yes, Bobbin! And you are the first\255\001to behold it with mortal eyes.

93b9d21e.text: 做得好，波賓！你已經修復了\255\001那主教惹出的大部分麻煩。
93b9d21e.english_text: Good work, Bobbin! You've repaired\255\001much of that Bishop's mischief.

4f9bb84e.text: 也許現在你可以悄無聲息地\255\001接近織機了。
4f9bb84e.english_text: Perhaps now you can approach the Loom\255\001without being detected.

59122a4c.text: 太棒了，孩子。只剩下一個洞\255\001等著你去處理了！
59122a4c.english_text: Excellent, my son. Only one hole\255\001awaits your attention!

cf645a9c.text: 做得好，孩子！一半的洞已經封上了。\255\001很快你就能準備好繼續前進了。
cf645a9c.english_text: Well done, son! Half the holes are sealed.\255\001Soon you will be ready to continue.

6564f385.text: 務必把你身後的洞\255\001全都封上，孩子。
6564f385.english_text: Do not fail to seal all of the holes\255\001behind you, my son.

e03d3d77.text: 否則你絕對無法靠近織機。
e03d3d77.english_text: You dare not approach the Loom otherwise.

a4f33fd7.text: 波賓！還有一個洞\255\001你還沒封上。
a4f33fd7.english_text: Bobbin! There's still one hole\255\001you have yet to seal.

e65ce779.text: 你還有幾個洞\255\001沒封上呢，波賓。
e65ce779.english_text: There are still a few holes you\255\001haven't sealed, Bobbin.

fb9f4867.text: 所有的洞都必須封上，\255\001你才有可能接近織機。
fb9f4867.english_text: All of the holes should be sealed\255\001before you dare approach the Loom.

72348b2a.text: 你一定有很多疑問，波賓。
72348b2a.english_text: You must have many questions, Bobbin.

09aa2836.text: 也許我能回答其中一些。
09aa2836.english_text: Perhaps I can answer some of them.

0a860bf7.text: 你就是在我的生日時\255\001來看我的那天鵝，對吧？
0a860bf7.english_text: You're the swan that came to visit me\255\001on my birthdays, aren't you?

f2e03a98.text: 看來你當時看得很清楚！\255\001我一直不太確定。\255\001\255\001長老們禁止我\255\001踏上盧姆島。\255\001但他們可沒說\255\001不能飛過去！
f2e03a98.english_text: You saw me clearly, then!\255\001I was never quite sure.\255\001\255\001The Elders forbade me to\255\001set foot on Loom island.\255\001But they said nothing\255\001about flying over it!

d30e0746.english_text: Once a year, I managed\255\001to gain enough strength\255\001to pass Inside for a\255\001few brief moments.\255\001\255\001Those are the times\255\001that you saw me.

8c9b0aec.text: 你一定在想為什麼\255\001我要費盡心思\255\001去探望你…而且\255\001偏偏只在『你』的生日。\255\001\255\001這就當作是身為母親的\255\001好奇心吧。
8c9b0aec.english_text: You are wondering why\255\001I should bother to\255\001visit at all ... and\255\001only on YOUR birthdays.\255\001\255\001Call it a mother's\255\001curiosity.

89bc2561.english_text: For that is who I am.

b01c94f6.text: 在世時，我曾是\255\001西格娜·疏織夫人。\255\001\255\001因為從織機中織出了一個\255\001未曾預見的嬰孩，\255\001而被長老們放逐。\255\001\255\001那是漫長的十七年前了。
b01c94f6.english_text: In life, I was Lady\255\001Cygna Threadbare.\255\001\255\001Banished by the Elders\255\001for drawing an unforeseen\255\001infant out of the Loom.\255\001\255\001Seventeen long years ago.

f8bf7726.text: 我一直很想你…我的孩子。

5961180c.text: 我母親就葬在墓園裡。\255\001我每天都會去她的墓前！
5961180c.english_text: My mother is buried in the cemetery.\255\001I visit her gravestone every day!

ce003929.text: 那肯定是海切爾幹的好事。

b7b50565.text: 她和長老們弄了那個墓碑，\255\001好讓你不會問東問西。
b7b50565.english_text: She and the Elders put that there so\255\001you wouldn't ask too many questions.

b262d93e.text: 海切爾發誓會永遠保護你。\255\001她非常愛你，波賓。
b262d93e.english_text: Hetchel vowed to protect you forever.\255\001She loves you very much, Bobbin.

0ac8fd48.text: 但我擔心她的這份愛驅使著她\255\001做出了魯莽之舉。
0ac8fd48.english_text: But I fear her love has driven her\255\001to recklessness.

313532fd.text: 妳是什麼意思？她在哪裡？
313532fd.english_text: What do you mean? Where is she?

700099ac.english_text: She has set off for\255\001the island, and\255\001the Loom Sanctuary.\255\001\255\001The Dead Ones are\255\001right behind her!

f420e2c8.english_text: Their leader knows of\255\001the Loom's power.\255\001\255\001If he learns its\255\001secrets, the Pattern\255\001itself will be his\255\001to manipulate.\255\001\255\001Who knows what havoc\255\001he might wreak?

765db3bb.english_text: Hetchel hopes to\255\001reach the Loom\255\001before him.\255\001\255\001She intends to\255\001destroy it!

e1ac39c2.text: 如果混沌沒有\255\001先一步吞噬她的話。

eb001599.english_text: No! I have to get back there!

4d97e9f6.text: 那個方向你走不了多遠。\255\001織機在湖的另一端。
4d97e9f6.english_text: You won't get far in that direction.\255\001The Loom lies beyond the lake.

c29bdd03.text: 此外，採用更巧妙的策略或許能\255\001提高你成功的機率。
c29bdd03.english_text: Besides, a more subtle strategy may\255\001improve your chances of success.

0e48e622.english_text: What strategy? What should I do?

29eed54e.text: 死者們會透過你那位主教朋友\255\001在織圖上弄出的破洞間移動。
29eed54e.english_text: The Dead Ones move between the holes your\255\001Bishop friend made in the Pattern.

f0122746.text: 如果你能把那些洞補起來，\255\001他們就很難追蹤你了。
f0122746.english_text: If you repair those holes, it will make\255\001it harder for them to follow you.

cf564b50.text: 我不能走這條路。出口被擋住了！
cf564b50.english_text: I can't go this way. The exit's blocked!

a1035e85.text: 把你的魔法留著對付死者吧，\255\001織者男孩。
a1035e85.english_text: Save your magic for the Dead Ones,\255\001Weaver boy.

eaeb658d.text: 古德莫德大師！你還活著…

d57ad0f6.text: 古德莫德大師。你受傷了。

34b5cc8c.text: 至少，你逃過了\255\001死者們的注意。
34b5cc8c.english_text: You, at least, have escaped the\255\001attention of the Dead Ones.

a9282bf2.text: 水晶加德…就沒那麼幸運了。

d490c939.text: 你們不是守護著大鐮刀嗎！\255\001為什麼不用它？
d490c939.english_text: You're the keepers of the Great Scythe!\255\001Why didn't you use it?

d8fc76a7.text: 我們從不懷疑那把鐮刀\255\001能拯救我們。
d8fc76a7.english_text: We never doubted that the Scythe\255\001could save us.

cf4fff67.text: 在它的怒火之下，\255\001連死者都會倒下！
cf4fff67.english_text: Even the Dead would have fallen\255\001in the wake of its wrath!

ebba87e7.text: 但釋放如此無情的邪惡力量，\255\001只會讓我們和他們一樣懦弱。
ebba87e7.english_text: But to unleash such merciless evil would\255\001make us as cowardly as they.

f7f71691.text: 我們不想變得和我們的敵人一樣。
f7f71691.english_text: We wished not to become like our enemy.

24b451a3.text: 所以我們選擇了收手。我們知道代價是什麼。
24b451a3.english_text: And so we stayed our hand.\255\001We knew the price.

6363c7bf.text: 記住我們，我年輕的朋友。

9a32efe6.text: 告訴世人我們曾勇敢奮戰，\255\001並且澄明地選擇了死亡。
9a32efe6.english_text: Tell the world we fought with courage,\255\001and chose death with clarity.

a40de5b5.text: 這麼快就要走了嗎，織者男孩？

14e12ead.text: 沒用的，波賓。織圖的那一面\255\001現在已經超出我們音符的干涉範圍了。
14e12ead.english_text: No use, Bobbin. That side of the Pattern\255\001is beyond the reach of our threads now.

8c69f8a7.text: 織機已被拆解，邪惡再也無法觸及了！
8c69f8a7.english_text: The Loom is unmade, beyond Evil's reach!

663353bc.text: 無知的蠢貨！你們做了什麼好事？
663353bc.english_text: Ignorant fools! What have you done?

7924e40b.text: 我們誰也無法\255\001跨越這條被你們\255\001織者盲目胡搞\255\001所製造出來的裂縫了！
7924e40b.english_text: None of us can pass\255\001across this rift your\255\001Weaver mischief has\255\001so blindly created!

8e01727b.text: 你這自命清高的干涉\255\001毀了我建立一個\255\001受同一規則統治的\255\001永恆帝國的美夢…
8e01727b.english_text: Your pious meddling\255\001has foiled my dream\255\001of an eternal empire,\255\001bound together under\255\001One Rule ...

5fe06cde.english_text: The Dead One is\255\001correct, my son.\255\001\255\001Your final draft\255\001tore the Pattern\255\001in half.

8b58ce7d.text: 對於那些\255\001受困在另一邊的\255\001無辜者來說，\255\001這確實是個悲慘的命運。
8b58ce7d.english_text: This is a sad fate\255\001indeed for the\255\001innocents trapped\255\001on the other side.

3545b9a6.text: 然而，這\255\001也是我們\255\001這一邊的一個機會，\255\001得以重新開始編織\255\001沒有邪惡的\255\001第二張織圖！
3545b9a6.english_text: However, it is\255\001also a chance for\255\001we on THIS side\255\001to begin a second\255\001Pattern, cleansed\255\001of wickedness!

a314887c.english_text: Come.\255\001\255\001It is time for us\255\001to weave our\255\001destinies anew.

4536347d.text: 但我們不能就這樣拋下\255\001半個宇宙不管啊！
4536347d.english_text: But we can't just abandon\255\001half the universe!

01cb4db8.english_text: I fear we have no choice.

97701678.text: 直到我們這邊的織圖被修補好之前，\255\001我們是無法回到另一邊的。
97701678.english_text: Until our side of the Pattern is mended,\255\001we cannot return to the other.

d49f529d.text: 現在就來站到我們之中\255\001屬於你的位置吧。
d49f529d.english_text: Take your rightful place\255\001among us now.

176c5156.text: 我是古德莫德大師，高貴的\255\001玻璃工匠公會的第三十一任大師。
176c5156.english_text: I am Master Goodmold, thirty-first in\255\001the Noble Guild of Glassmakers.

ee30fd74.english_text: Who have I the honor of meeting?

3c27d429.text: 我叫波賓。波賓·疏織，\255\001來自，呃，高貴的織者公會。
3c27d429.english_text: My name's Bobbin. Bobbin Threadbare,\255\001of the, er, Noble Guild of Weavers.

89c83733.english_text: Guild of Weavers?\255\001\255\001I don't remember\255\001having a Weaver\255\001visit us before.

2933a404.text: 我現在明白為什麼你們的\255\001布料會如此珍貴了。\255\001\255\001你身上的這件斗篷\255\001與我見過的任何東西\255\001都不一樣。\255\001\255\001真是非凡的做工。
2933a404.english_text: I see now why your\255\001fabrics are so prized.\255\001\255\001The cloak you wear\255\001is unlike anything\255\001I have ever beheld.\255\001\255\001Remarkable workmanship.

b1258427.text: 水晶加德的典籍中\255\001記載了許多關於\255\001你們公會的傳說。\255\001\255\001其中有一個特別\255\001奇怪又有趣。\255\001\255\001據說只要窺探\255\001織者的兜帽底下，\255\001就會招致死亡。
b1258427.english_text: Crystalgard's wisdom\255\001includes many legends\255\001concerning your Guild.\255\001\255\001One is particularly\255\001strange and amusing.\255\001\255\001They say it is death\255\001to peer beneath the\255\001hood of a Weaver.

6f77c747.text: 不知道。還沒有人在我身上試過。
6f77c747.english_text: Don't know. Nobody ever tried it on me.

170f03dc.text: 哈！這可真是我聽過最含糊的答案了。
170f03dc.english_text: Ha! An unclear reply if I ever heard one.

b903460d.text: 我們這裡最看重的就是澄明。
b903460d.english_text: We value clarity here above all else.

01a0c6bd.text: 但別擔心！我們是不會去驗證你的傳說的。
01a0c6bd.english_text: But fear not! Your legend is safe with us.

326a7292.text: 對了。你有沒有注意到\255\001有一群天鵝從這裡經過？
326a7292.english_text: By the way. Did you happen to notice\255\001a flock of swans passing this way?

b7ca897b.text: 這座城市最近\255\001實在太忙了，我懷疑\255\001是不是還有人有閒情逸致\255\001去賞鳥。
b7ca897b.english_text: The city's been so\255\001busy of late, I doubt\255\001if anyone's had time\255\001for bird-watching.

be52fd8c.text: 不過，我們公會的\255\001產品目錄裡有許多精良的\255\001雙筒望遠鏡、\255\001單筒望遠鏡和其他\255\001精密光學儀器，\255\001或許能對你\255\001尋找天鵝有所幫助。
be52fd8c.english_text: However, our Guild\255\001catalog offers a fine\255\001selection of binoculars,\255\001telescopes and other\255\001precision optics that\255\001may help you in your\255\001search for swans.

4e86338c.english_text: Thanks. I'll browse through it later.

42f7c417.text: 請隨意四處看看吧，\255\001織者疏織。
42f7c417.english_text: Look around as much as you want,\255\001Weaver Threadbare.

785f3161.text: 人們應該在用完後\255\001把自己的東西清理乾淨。
785f3161.english_text: People ought to clean up\255\001after themselves.

cdf4415d.english_text: Maybe I should spin this back.

c2a294ee.english_text: This pile hasn't been spun yet.

afdf6a8c.text: 這織法對紡車不起作用。
afdf6a8c.english_text: That draft won't work on a spinning wheel.

964c2ba5.text: 這舊紡車吱吱嘎嘎響得真厲害。
964c2ba5.english_text: This old wheel is pretty squeaky.

1fa56e82.text: 這堆的稻草\255\001已經全被紡出來了。
1fa56e82.english_text: All the straw's been spun out\255\001of this pile.

a90f845c.text: 這堆的金子\255\001已經全被紡出來了。
a90f845c.english_text: All the gold's been spun out\255\001of this pile.

43b9becd.text: 這織法對\255\001一堆金子不起作用。
43b9becd.english_text: That draft won't work on\255\001a pile of gold.

83fc5fdf.text: 這織法對\255\001一堆稻草不起作用。
83fc5fdf.english_text: That draft won't work on\255\001a pile of straw.

5c5a72fb.english_text: In Memory Of\255\001LADY CYGNA THREADBARE\255\0017983-8004\255\001\255\001Destiny shall draw the Lightning\255\001Down from Heaven; roll its thunder\255\001Far across the Sea, to where I\255\001Wait upon the Share of Wonder,\255\001On the day the Sky is Opened\255\001And the Tree is split asunder.

f68d7f41.text: 太棒了。我什麼都看不見。
f68d7f41.english_text: Great. I can't see a thing.

6ab4270b.text: 這織法對黑暗不起作用。
6ab4270b.english_text: That draft won't work on the darkness.

382cbff4.english_text: That draft won't work on me.

35d3228c.text: 趁還能飛，快逃吧，織者男孩。
35d3228c.english_text: Fly away while you can, Weaver boy.

1bbe00e1.text: 總有一天我們會再見面的！
1bbe00e1.english_text: One day we will meet again!

7d18da0f.text: 選擇熟練度。\255\001如需協助，請參閱您的《Loom》手冊。
7d18da0f.english_text: Select a Proficiency Level.\255\001Refer to your Loom]^ manual for help.

b85e929a.text: 您輸入的秘密織法不正確。\255\001如需協助，請參閱您的《Loom》手冊。
b85e929a.english_text: The Secret Weave you entered is incorrect.\255\001Refer to your Loom]^ manual for assistance.

df155fba.text: 與這個公會和線程\255\001相關的秘密織法是什麼？\255\001如需協助，請參閱您的《織圖之書》。
df155fba.english_text: What is the secret weave associated\255\001with this Guild and Thread?\255\001Refer to your Book of Patterns for help.
